dialogos.texto_en: Ooohh...!
This is the air of Okinawa!\nThis is it! The tropics!!
Wow, you're really excited.
You've been like that since the plane landed.\nYour excitement is off the charts.
You're so loud.\nPeople around us are looking at us.
Sorry!\nBut it's completely different from mainland Japan!\nI can't believe it's the same country!!
I said, you're being too loud!
I'm sorry big bro is acting like that.
You don't have to apologize, Raiha-chan.
Well, it is what it is.\nBeing kind of cheesy or maybe a little childish.
I can understand the feeling, though.\nIt's like we've come to an extraordinary place.
Yeah, it's so exciting!\nThank you for bringing us here!
No problem.\nLet's all enjoy Okinawa together.
Oh, I'm glad you made it here safely.\nYou passed the exams too!\nWe're officially on our graduation trip!
It's because of you.\nThanks, Futaro-kun.
You worked hard too, Ichika.
Yeah!\nIt's amazing that you managed\nto balance out both work and academics.
Oh? It looks like I've become an even better big sister.\nHehe, you could praise me more, you know?
Don't get carried away.
Okay, let's first confirm the travel plan.\nI don't think we've explained it\nto Fu-kun and Raiha-chan yet.
That's right.\nLet's see...
Here, Futaro-kun.\nAnd also, one for Raiha-chan.
Oh? Did you make an itinerary for us?\nYou're really into this.
Ahaha, I made it on a whim.\nThere's a rough schedule on the first page.
The trip is for six days.\nBut since the first day is today and the last day\nis for going back, it's really four days.
Tomorrow, we'll start with the classic Shurijo Castle.\nThen we'll head to the international street, Kokusai dori\nand Mihama American Village.
On the third day, we'll go to\nOkinawa Churaumi Aquarium and Ocean Expo Park.\nThen we'll enjoy some ocean activities!
On the fourth day, we'll head to the south of Okinawa.\nWe'll visit Okinawa World and the surrounding area.
On the last day, we'll enjoy the Okinawa ocean again\nand finish with a barbecue.
Wow, we're going all over the place!
We actually narrowed it down quite a bit, you know?\nThere are so many places to go in Okinawa\nthat it was really difficult to decide.
Hmmm, I think it's good.\nWe'll be getting the best of Okinawa.
So, we're not going anywhere else today, right?
We aren't.\nLet's check in at the hotel and have dinner.
Shall we confirm the itinerary for our trip?\nWe haven't explained it\nto Uesugi-kun and Raiha-chan yet.
You're right.\nOkay...
Here, for you, Futaro.\nAnd one for Raiha-chan too.
Oh? Did you make an itinerary for us?\nWow, you're on the ball.
I wrote the schedule in my notebook\nand just put it together.
The trip is planned for six days, but it's really only four.\nThe first day is arriving at Okinawa,\nand the last day is for going back.
Tomorrow, we'll spend the day\nsightseeing on Kouri Island.\nThe next day, we'll go to the beach and have a barbecue.
On the fourth day, we'll visit Shurijo Castle\nand then head to Kokusai dori\nand Mihama American Village.
On the fifth day,\nwe'll go to the Okinawa Churaumi Aquarium\nand the Ocean Expo Park.
Wow, we're going all over the place.
I had a hard time deciding on this itinerary.\nIf we want to enjoy all of Okinawa,\nfour days isn't enough.
So, we're not going anywhere else today, right?
We aren't.\nLet's check in at the hotel and have dinner.
Okay, let's first confirm the travel plan.\nI don't think we've explained it\nto Fu-kun and Raiha-chan yet.
Ah, yeah, that's right.\nUmm...
Futaro, here.\nOne for you too, Raiha-chan.
Wow! A travel guide!\nYou made it for us.
You're really pumped up.
I-I guess.
Um, the itinerary is for six days,\nbut actually, we're only here for four days.\nWe'll be traveling by plane on the first and last day.
Tomorrow, we'll first go to Shurijo Castle.\nThen the plan\nis to go to the Okinawa Prefectural Museum.
On the third day, we will see castle ruins\nand places like the Valley of Gangala.
Oh! Isn't that the place I said I wanted to see?\nYou actually included it in the plan.
Yeah...
On the fourth day, we'll visit the international street, Kokusai dori.\nAfter that, we'll have fun at the beach.
On the last day, we'll go to Ocean Expo Park.\nWe'll finish our trip\nby seeing places like Churaumi Aquarium.
Hmmm, impressive!\nIt's a well-planned trip, and we'll get to\nexperience all of the quintessential Okinawan places.
...Yes, thank you.
? Miku-san?
What, Raiha-chan?
Ah, it's nothing.\nThank you for the wonderful plan.
So, we're not going anywhere else today, right?
We aren't.\nLet's check in at the hotel and have dinner.
Shall we confirm the itinerary for our trip?\nWe haven't explained it\nto Uesugi-kun and Raiha-chan yet.
Oh, right!\nWell then...
Here you go!\nThis is the travel guide for this trip!
Woah, you went so far as to prepare this.\nYou're really pumped up.
Heehee.\nWell, please take a look at the first page.\nThis gives you an overview of the entire trip.
The itinerary is for six days, but in reality,\nit'll only be four days. On the first and last day,\nwe'll be traveling by plane. So, for tomorrow...
Let's start by playing in the sea to our\nheart's content! You know, when it comes to\nOkinawa, it's all about the emerald green sea!
The next day is the international street, Kokusai dori.\nFrom there, we'll move on to Ocean Expo Park.
That's where \nthe Okinawa Churaumi Aquarium is.
On the third day, we'll visit Shurijo Castle!\nThis is a must-see! Then, we'll head to the\nOkinawa Prefectural Museum to learn more about Okinawa.
On the last day, we'll spend the day enjoying\nthe area around Mihama American Village.
That's about it.\nWhat do you think?
Wow, this itinerary is packed with so much stuff!
Just looking at it makes me excited.
Hehehe, I'm honored by your kind words.
So, we're not going anywhere else today, right?
Nope.\nLet's check in at the hotel and have dinner.
Okay, let's first confirm the travel plan.\nI don't think we've explained it\nto Fu-kun and Raiha-chan yet.
Understood.\nWell then...
Here you are.
Wow! Is this a travel guide?
Yes, I made it on a whim.\nThough, I feel a little embarrassed\nbecause it looks like I got a little too excited.
No, I think it's easy to understand.\nIt's helpful for us.
O-oh, really? Well, then let me explain it to you.
The trip is for six days, but we can use\nonly four days for sightseeing. The first and last days\nare for traveling only.
Tomorrow, we will first go to a place called\nSenagajima Umikaji Terrace.
After that, we will visit Shurijo Castle\nand go sightseeing at the international street, Kokusai dori.
On the third day, we'll spend the entire day swimming.\nBecause you can't say Okinawa without thinking \nof the beautiful ocean, right?
On the fourth day, we will go to Ocean Expo Park.\nThe Churaumi Aquarium here is particularly famous.
After that, we will head to Mihama American Village.
On the last day, we will visit Okinawa World\nand other nearby sightseeing spots to end the trip.
Wow, there are famous places\nand places I don't really even know. This is going to be fun.
There are just so many places to see,\nthat it was difficult to narrow it all down.
So, we're not going anywhere else today, right?
We aren't.\nShall we check in at the hotel and have dinner?
Okay then, let's take a taxi%p-2;――
No, no! We should enjoy the view!
Huh?
Since we came to Okinawa, let's take the Yui Rail!
Oh, yes. That's a good idea,\nconsidering we're here.
However, if we're going to take the Yui Rail,\nthis isn't the exit we should use.
What?!\nOh no, we're stumbling right off the bat!\nLet's hurry up!
There's no need to hurry.
You're really excited.\nI hope you can calm down a little\nwhile we're on the monorail.
Sorry, but my big bro is always like that.
